title: microsoft/Ontology-Playground
content: Microsoft's Ontology-Playground is a free, open-source web application for learning about ontologies and Microsoft Fabric IQ. Written in TypeScript, it features a static, serverless architecture with no backend. Users can browse pre-built ontologies, create custom designs visually, export them as RDF/XML files, and share interactive diagrams. The project has 1,576 stars and 224 forks on GitHub.

title: 0.5 秒的直觉，揭开开源世界最危险的供应链攻击
content:
2024 年 3 月 29 日，微软工程师 Andres Freund 在调试一台测试机时注意到一个异常：SSH 远程登录多了大约 0.5 秒的延迟。 绝大多数人会让这个数字从眼皮底下滑过去。他没有。

Freund 顺着这半秒钟一路追下去，最终挖出了一个精心策划超过两年、针对…

title: 记录一下： AI 图片 prompt 越写越长，不如先把参考图的职责拆清楚
content:

然后发现不对，又开始补：

title: 今年最火爆的三部短剧，没有一个是“正经团队”
content: Amateur creators produced three major hits this year: the interactive game "Shengshi Tianxia" by former Bilibili creator Zhizhu, the infinite-loop short series ENEMY by bloggers "Jianbing Guozai" and "Summer Sister," and the AI short film "Zombie Cleaner" by untrained creator Liu Ziyu. AI tools and mature platforms lowered production barriers, enabling small teams with distinctive personal aesthetics to outperform formulaic industrial content. Wild creators now attract serious commercial investment while maintaining creative agility.

title: K3发布48小时，服务器满载、英伟达暴跌、Anthropic连夜改订阅
content: Chinese AI startup Kimi released its open-source K3 model, immediately overwhelming servers and forcing a pause on new subscriptions. The 2.8-trillion-parameter model ranks third globally in performance, behind only Claude Fable 5 and GPT-5.6 Sol, at roughly half the cost. K3's "vision in the loop" capability enables autonomous coding iteration with visual feedback. The release triggered an 1111 billion dollar Nvidia selloff and prompted competitor Anthropic to reverse subscription changes. Kimi is now preparing for a Hong Kong IPO at over 30 billion valuation, with ARR tripling to nearly 300 million dollars in three months.

title: AI-Token 消耗，为啥跟流水一样。。。。。
content:
The user is concerned about rapid AI token consumption, questioning whether it's a misconception or an actual problem. They ask how to address it and whether long context is the cause. The summary must be under 80 words, declarative, and in English.

Potential causes: long context windows, repeated prompts, inefficient API usage, or large system prompts. Solutions: truncate history, summarize earlier context, use shorter prompts, or switch models.

Drafting:
High AI-token usage often stems from lengthy conversation history or large context windows being processed repeatedly. Solutions include trimming older messages, summarizing prior context, shortening prompts, and selecting appropriately sized models. Monitoring token counts per request helps identify specific inefficiencies.

Checking word count: 32 words. Good.</think>High AI-token usage often stems from lengthy conversation history or large context windows being processed repeatedly. Solutions include trimming older messages, summarizing prior context, shortening prompts, and selecting appropriately sized models. Monitoring token counts per request

title: DeepSeek V4「满血版」曝光了，最快明天发布
content: DeepSeek V4 is reportedly releasing imminently, with Flash and Pro variants. Early testing shows near-Opus 4.8 performance, strong coding capabilities, and improved agent and 3D/SVG generation. The model introduces surge pricing: V4 Pro costs $0.87–$1.74 per million output tokens, while Flash costs $0.28–$0.56. Despite not leading on raw performance against competitors like Fable 5 and Kimi K3, DeepSeek maintains aggressive pricing at roughly one-seventh of rival costs, reinforcing its market position as a low-cost provider of capable AI models.

title: Kimi逼得两大巨头改变定价？奥特曼罕见认错，Claude额度重置
content: Chinese AI startup Kimi K3's low-cost launch pressured OpenAI and Anthropic into a user grab. OpenAI CEO Sam Altman admitted past performance was subpar, while his CFO introduced "Useful Intelligence per Dollar" as a new metric emphasizing completed tasks over token pricing. Both companies raced to increase usage limits—OpenAI hitting 9 million active users for its Codex tool in days, Anthropic boosting Claude Code quotas—to capture long-task data from AI agents. The competition centers on which AI becomes embedded in daily workflows, shifting from answering questions to autonomously completing work.
eventKey: kimi逼得两大巨头改变定价-奥特曼罕见认错-claude额度重置

title: 在WAIC 2026暴走三天后，我发现今年最火的AI，都不在电脑里了
content: At WAIC 2026 in Shanghai, AI's center of gravity shifted from cloud models to physical hardware. Two zones dominated: AI phones and robots. StepX Neo demonstrated an agent-native OS executing tasks across apps, while Nubia's Doubao phone advanced toward mass production. Meanwhile, over 200 robotics firms showcased factory-ready machines—picking pharmacy orders, assembling components, and serving coffee—with metrics shifting from dance stability to task success rates and payback periods. The competition has moved from model parameters to embodied deployment: phones and wearables as consumer interfaces, robots as industrial tools.
